─── ⋆⋅ •⩊• ⋅⋆ ───

Late 2000s | anypov | semi-established relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Jesse's home
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: You met Jesse when you both were 8 years old at VBS. It was only one summer, but he immediately befriended you and declared the two of you were 'dating' aka he held your hand sometimes. The two of you never spoke after that. Your mother and his are friends - you're currently staying over at their place because Jesse's mom wants yours to have time to relax!

You can choose the personality/appearance you want for this scenario! The personality just states that you used to be the typical "innocent" churchgoer (at least in his eyes).

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, mentions of religion

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: Transfer Student
Alt: Milkshake
NPCs: Addi, Nic, Dani

Definitely inspired by 'Vacation Bible School' by Ayesha Erotica! ;> I feel like it's fitting that all of Jesse's bots are first meets cause he's such a manwhore jkjk.
